inputs.label: Distance
inputs.businessContext: Horizontal distance of the climbing route

inputs.label: Elevation Gain
inputs.businessContext: Total vertical ascent of the route

inputs.label: Flat Walking Speed
inputs.businessContext: Average horizontal speed on flat terrain

inputs.label: Ascent Pace
inputs.businessContext: Vertical ascent speed in meters per hour

inputs.label: Difficulty Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Terrain difficulty factor (e.g. 1.0 for easy, 1.5 for rough)

inputs.label: Safety Margin
inputs.businessContext: Additional time percentage for rests and contingencies
